deploy.startCommand: python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python -c "import os; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'config.settings'); import django; django.setup(); from django.db import connection; from django.db.migrations.recorder import MigrationRecorder; r = MigrationRecorder(connection); [(r.record_applied(app, name) if not r.migration_qs.filter(app=app, name=name).exists() else None) for app, name in [('tenants', '0003_tenant_status'), ('products', '0006_product_is_active'), ('products', '0006_product_quantity'), ('products', '0007_remove_product_is_active'), ('products', '0008_merge_20260626_1707')]]" && python manage.py migrate inventory zero && python -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect('/app/db.sqlite3'); conn.execute('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS inventory_inventory'); conn.commit(); conn.close()" && python manage.py migrate inventory && python manage.py migrate --noinput && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT
